use_cases: Collapsible content sections for FAQ pages
Accordion-style navigation menus with expandable items
Step-by-step wizards showing one section at a time
Organizing long-form content into digestible sections
Collapsible sidebar sections for dashboard interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight accordion/collapse component that reveals or hides content on click. Features a smooth arrow rotation animation, configurable size variants (small/large), controlled and uncontrolled modes, and clean borders. Designed for organizing dense content like FAQs, documentation sections, or settings panels with minimal visual noise.
